title: Sprint-95 closeout (+1 rule, 4th formal instance)
sprintTheme: Descope Test (N=3) + Drift Read-Side + Housekeeping During Stage1 Pause

predecessorOutcomes: sprint-92: first formal closeout, zero retro-splits
sprint-93: second formal closeout, zero retro-splits
sprint-94: third formal closeout, zero retro-splits

missions.title: Synthetic full-payload map_create smoke + ack response to Stage1 v1.7.0 info_push

outcomes.smokeShape: Single synthetic map.create payload carries both projection_variants[] and raw-string propMappings[].coercion labels
outcomes.roundTrip: Dry-run accepted, apply:true persisted, and map.resolve preserved projection variants plus coercionType values
outcomes.stage1Posture: v1.7.0 accepted as additive; no hard OODS-side activation required

missions.title: Widen structuredData.fetch allow-list for drift_report (read-side only)

outcomes.meta: structuredData.fetch now emits signalCount for drift_report payloads
outcomes.guardrail: Unknown drift_report schema versions still fast-fail with structured ToolError details

missions.title: Test-isolation housekeeping: per-test temp dir for component-mappings.json contention

outcomes.mappingsIsolation: MCP_MAPPINGS_PATH override added and mapping-writing suites moved onto per-suite temp mappings files
outcomes.bridgeFlake: Shared bridge build/start harness removes parallel startup contention across bridge-backed suites
outcomes.playgroundSync: Stage1 fixture assertions updated to match current labels and summary text
outcomes.parallelVerification: pnpm exec vitest run --project core passed 3 consecutive runs (396 files / 3673 tests)

deliverables.workCommitsOnOrigin: origin/sprint-95 contains 7f5b194, b3e4ef1, and f1db899 in dependency order

qualityGates.coreParallel: 396 files / 3673 tests green for 3 consecutive runs during s95-m03 verification

postureFlex.result: Succeeded; all four sprint-95 missions completed without reopening scope or retro-splitting

carryForward: No local Stage1 response to the s95-m01 status_update was observed in repo CMOS artifacts as of 2026-04-18; monitor in sprint-96 rather than blocking closeout.

decisionsHigh: Keep drift_report activation deliberately read-side only; do not define downstream normalizer or playground consumer surfaces without a demand signal.
Fix the shared component-mappings contention by making the production path overridable instead of serializing the entire suite forever.
Treat sprint-95 as a real posture-flex experiment: N=3 work missions plus closeout is sufficient when scope is tight and evidence is explicit.
